summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Goldner & Dias Paes Advocacia premium law firm homepage. All major components and sections are working correctly with proper styling and responsive design.

ui_bugs.issue: Desktop navigation links not visible/clickable on mobile viewport when testing navigation functionality
ui_bugs.details: Navigation links are hidden on mobile and only accessible through mobile menu, which is working correctly

design_issues.issue: Generic page title 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of firm-specific title
design_issues.details: Should be 'Goldner & Dias Paes Advocacia' or similar firm-specific title

passed_tests: Hero section renders with logo, headline, and CTA button
Navigation links work (Sobre, Serviços, Equipe, Escritórios) - all 4 links present
Value proposition section displays 3 columns correctly
Services grid shows all 6 service cards
About section with split layout (text + image) working
Founder/Team section with single profile displays correctly
Differentiation section with 4 bullet points present
Office locations section with 3 office cards (São Paulo, Rio, Brasília)
CTA section with 'Fale Conosco' button functional
Footer with social links (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook) all present
Mobile responsive navigation menu opens/closes correctly
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Gold accent color (#D4AF37) properly applied throughout
Playfair Display font loaded for headings
All images loading successfully (hero background, founder, about, offices)
Hover effects working on service cards, office cards, navigation links
action_item_for_main_agent: Update page title from generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to firm-specific title like 'Goldner & Dias Paes Advocacia - Assessoria Jurídica de Excelência'
